summary: Frontend testing of new PDF Reader feature (/read). All critical paths — access gate, dropzone, file input accept='application/pdf', non-PDF rejection toast, header controls mount, New map creation (source='reader'), injected-text selection → floating toolbar → add-node persistence in localStorage 'mindmapper.maps.v1', reader-go-to-map → /app?map=<id>, Studio btn-open-reader → /read?map=<id>, ?map=<id> dropdown pre-selection, and /intake /library /app regressions — all PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: PdfReader.jsx is 529 lines — acceptable but sub-components (PdfPage, FloatingToolbar, ReaderHeader) could be split into /components/reader/ for maintainability as the feature grows.
pdfReaderLoader uses a silent try/catch fallback for worker — worth logging a console.warn so worker fallback to CDN is visible during debugging.

In PdfPage useEffect, the page.render() error is swallowed silently with empty /* ignore */ — consider logging at debug level to aid troubleshooting when render actually fails (not just on fast reloads).
test_credentials: Access gate: mind-mapper67 (from REACT_APP_UNLOCK_KEY). No auth/Stripe used.
seed_data_creation: Test flow created one localStorage map via 'reader-new-map' button (source='reader') and appended one child node from injected selection. Data is per-browser-session localStorage only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Reader at /read is fully working. Minimal PDF buffer was accepted and pdf.js rendered it (with 'fake worker' fallback warning — harmless, worker?url import works in Vite/CRA build). For future tests, inject a stub .pdf-text-layer span inside [data-testid='reader-pages'] and dispatch a mouseup to reliably trigger the floating selection toolbar without depending on pdf.js text-layer timing. The 401 console errors observed are pre-existing unauthenticated /api/auth/me calls from AuthProvider (not a regression).
